events.title: Happy Birthday!
events.message: On behalf of the Emirates Group, we wish you a year of safe skies, new horizons, and well-earned moments.

events.title: Happy New Year!
events.message: Wishing you a year of fresh starts, smooth flights, and great moments with the team.

events.title: EID Mubarrak!
events.message: Wishing you a year of fresh starts, smooth flights, and great moments with the team.
